title: Distinguishing theoretical synaptic potentials computed for different soma-dendritic distributions of synaptic input
abstract: Abstract not available in Crossref or OpenAlex public metadata for this 1967 paper. The paper analytically computes EPSP waveforms at the soma as a function of synaptic input location along the soma-dendritic axis of a Rall equivalent-cylinder neuron model, and proposes shape-index measurements (rise time and half-width) as empirical diagnostics of synaptic input location.
download_failure_reason: Journal of Neurophysiology (APS) full text is paywalled; the DOI landing page returns the abstract only. Unpaywall and OpenAlex report no open-access version. Added to intervention/paywalled_papers.md for institutional retrieval.
